/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/lwm2mclient.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_access_control.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_connectivity_moni.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_connectivity_stat.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_device.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_firmware.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_location.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_security.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_server.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_test.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/system_api.c.o CMakeFiles/lwm2mclient_tinydtls.dir/home/nihil/Projects/wakaama_arm2/examples/client/common/object_software_mgmt.c.o -o lwm2mclient_tinydtls  wakaama_lib/libwakaama_static.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
